nasb.text: I saw another strong angel coming down out of heaven, clothed with a cloud; and the rainbow was upon his head, and his face was like the sun, and his feet like pillars of fire;

esv.text: Then I saw another mighty angel coming down from heaven, wrapped in a cloud, with a rainbow over his head, and his face was like the sun, and his legs like pillars of fire.

cnv.text: 我又看見一位大力的天使從天上降下來，身披雲彩，頭上有彩虹，臉像太陽，兩腳像火柱一樣，

ccb.text: 我看见另一位大力天使从天而降。他身披云霞，头顶彩虹，脸如太阳，双腿如火柱，

csbs.text: 接着，我看见另一位强有力的天使从天上降下来，披着云彩；又有一道彩虹在他头上。他的脸像太阳，脚像火柱，
